xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Translations
xwikidoc.content:
sopManager.name=SOP Manager sopManager.addPage.label=Add the current page to the review process sopManager.addPage.hint=Register this procedure in the review and approval process and manage reviewers, approval status, revisions, and revision dates. sopManager.addPage.button.label=Start review sopManager.addPage.added=Page added to review. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.label=Submit for review sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.title=Submit for review sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.error=Please select the review user before submitting the current document for review. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview.success=The document was submitted for review and « {0} » will receive soon a notification. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.label=Submit for approval sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.title=Submit for approval sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.error=Please select the approval user before submitting the current document for approval. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval.success=The document was submitted for approval and « {0} » will receive soon a notification. sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges.label=Return for changes sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges.title=Return for changes sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges.error=Please select the revision owner before returning the current document for changes. sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges.success=The document was returned for changes and « {0} » will receive soon a notification. sopManager.reviewPage.approve.label=Approve sopManager.reviewPage.approve.title=Approve sopManager.reviewPage.approve.error=Please ensure that the revision owner and the review user are assigned, so they can be notified about this action. sopManager.reviewPage.approve.success=The document was approved and « {0} » and « {1} » will receive soon a notification. sopManager.reviewPage.generatePDF.label=Generate PDF sopManager.reviewPage.generatePDF.title=Generate PDF sopManager.reviewPage.generatePDF.notAvailable=Server-side PDF generation is not available on this wiki. Please contact your administrator. sopManager.pdfTemplate.vertical.title=GKH FB TemplateDocument QM portrait sopManager.pdfTemplate.horizontal.title=GKH FB 8.2 TemplateDocument QM landscape sopManager.reviewPage.startNewRevision.label=Start a new revision sopManager.reviewPage.startNewRevision.title=Start a new revision sopManager.reviewPage.startNewRevision.success=A new revision has been started. sopManager.reviewPage.previousRevisions.label=Previous revisions PDFs sopManager.reviewPage.submitForReview=Submitted for review. sopManager.reviewPage.returnForChanges=Returned for changes. sopManager.reviewPage.submitForApproval=Submitted for approval.
SOPManager.Code.ControlledDocumentClass_status_returnedForChanges=Returned for changes SOPManager.Code.ControlledDocumentClass_status_draft=Draft SOPManager.Code.ControlledDocumentClass_status_submittedForReview=Submitted for review SOPManager.Code.ControlledDocumentClass_status_submittedForApproval=Submitted for approval SOPManager.Code.ControlledDocumentClass_status_approved=Approved
sopManager.pdfExport.page=Page sopManager.userProfile.ownedPages=Owned pages sopManager.userProfile.ownedPages.noResults=There are no pages added by you in the review system. sopManager.userProfile.pagesToReview=Pages to review sopManager.userProfile.pagesToReview.noResults=There are no pages waiting for your review. sopManager.userProfile.pagesToApprove=Pages to approve sopManager.userProfile.pagesToApprove.noResults=There are no pages waiting for your approval. sopManager.userProfile.noResults=There are no pages in the review system that require your attention. sopManager.contentMenu.backlinkToOrigin=View original document
sopManager.event.submittedForReviewEvent.description=A page is submitted for review sopManager.event.returnedForChangesEvent.description=A page is returned for changes sopManager.event.submittedForApprovalEvent.description=A page is submitted for approval notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.SubmittedForReviewEvent.description.by.1user=was submitted for review notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.SubmittedForReviewEvent.description=submitted page for review notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.ReturnedForChangesEvent.description.by.1user=was returned for changes notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.ReturnedForChangesEvent.description=returned page for changes notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.SubmittedForApprovalEvent.description.by.1user=was submitted for approval notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.SubmittedForApprovalEvent.description=submitted page for approval notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.ApprovedEvent.description.by.1user=was approved notifications.events.org.xwiki.contrib.sopmanager.internal.event.ApprovedEvent.description=approved page
sopManager.defaultSOPManager.error.invalidAction=Cannot perform action [{0}] when the document is in state [{1}]. sopManager.defaultSOPManager.error.notInWorkflow=The document is not part of the SOP workflow. sopManager.defaultPDFExportManager.saveDocument=Attach generated PDF
sopManager.defaultPDFExportManager.error.noTemporaryFile=The PDF export did not produce a temporary PDF file. sopManager.defaultPDFExportManager.error.missingTemporaryFile=The PDF export finished without creating the temporary PDF file at [{0}].
